name: Syrian Seseme Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, white sugar, brown sugar, and toasted sesame seeds) with a pinch of egg in a bowl.
2. Whisk together the wet ingredients (buttermilk, melted butter, and sesame seed oil).
3. Make a well in the center of the dry mixture and pour in the wet ingredients. Mix quickly until just combined.
4. Spoon the batter into muffin tins, filling each cup about 2/3 full.
5. Sprinkle a bit more toasted sesame seeds on top of each muffin.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 15 to 20 minutes, or until golden brown and cooked through. Makes 12 to 14 muffins.
7. These are great snack-sized muffins that pair well with honey and butter.
